mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id, tenant_id, agent_id, user_id, title, status, message_count, total_tokens, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at FROM t_conversation WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_conversation SET title = #{title}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_conversation SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_conversation SET message_count = message_count + #{delta}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_conversation SET total_tokens = total_tokens + #{tokens}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_conversation SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted = 0
